primary_issue.title: 强制 guru-team workflow 使用中文 Conventional Commits 提交规范
primary_issue.reason: intake/handoff 主 issue，默认进入 close 候选。
acceptance_evidence: Phase 2 check 已确认 workflow、README、spec、companion scripts、preset installer 与测试覆盖 issue #92 的中文 Conventional Commits 合同。
验证已通过：`python3 -m unittest trellis/workflows/guru-team/scripts/python/test_guru_team_trellis.py trellis/presets/guru-team/scripts/python/test_apply_guru_team_trellis_preset.py`，共 242 tests。
验证已通过：dogfood overlay drift、Python compile、bash syntax、`git diff --check`、task validate 与 public main throwaway install sample；当前分支 marketplace install 需 push 或 tag 后复验。
